title: The Amethyst
description:
The Amethyst [NeoForge 1.21.8]

The Amethyst is a mod that adds new Amethyst Biome, powerful tools!

 New Biome – Amethyst Biome 

Terrain made of amethyst crystal blocks
v.1.0.3
body:
The Amethyst

The Amethyst is a small expansion mod that adds a brand-new Amethyst Biome, several amethyst-themed tools, and a few custom crafting recipes.
This mod is made for Minecraft 1.21.8 using NeoForge.

New Biome: Amethyst Biome

A high amount of monsters

Occasional peaceful mobs like cows

Decorative amethyst blocks scattered around

The biome is dangerous but rewarding and perfect for players who love purple aesthetics and harder survival.

Items & Tools
Amethyst Sword

Crafted from 1 Stick + 2 Amethyst Shards

Slightly weaker than Netherite

Attack Damage: 7.5

Repairable using Amethyst Shards

Amethyst Pickaxe

Crafted from:

1 Deepslate Pickaxe

2 Amethyst Shards

2 Sticks

Mining efficiency close to Netherite

Very useful for mid-late game progression

Amethyst Axe

Stronger than Iron

Crafted from amethyst materials

Good for combat and fast woodcutting

Broken Amethyst Gem

A damaged version of the gem.
Currently has no major functionality but can be used in future crafting expansions.

Amethyst Gem

A special gem available only in Creative Mode.
It does not spawn naturally and is intended for custom building or testing.

Crafting Recipes

The mod includes several custom recipes, including:

Amethyst Sword Recipe

Amethyst Pickaxe Recipe

Amethyst Axe Recipe

Additional recipes for axe,pickaxe,sword.
v.1.0.3(BETA)
